lessons: Staff users (Reaper, Archmage) killed us 3 times in last 10 rounds — avoid 1v1s; use terrain to break line of sight.
Sword users (Executioner, Lancer, Hook, GhostProtocol) are our top kill targets — they appeared in 8/10 recent rounds and we killed 9 of them.
Shield users (Juggernaut, Fortress) are lethal in close quarters — retreat when they appear unless you have high ground or crowd control.
Double_bounty rounds favor staff users who secure multiple kills (e.g., round 194: 3 kills, 0 deaths) — exploit low-sword density windows.
Bow sightings above 100 (seen in 5/10 recent rounds) correlate with zero kills — delay aggression until bow density drops below 60.
Daggers (Viper) and Grapple (Scorpion) flank aggressively — stay near walls or corners to negate their mobility advantage.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff remains our highest-win-rate weapon (18/146 wins) and performed exceptionally in double_bounty rounds with 3 kills and 0 deaths.
